items.problem: TestHost_BraceParsersLoadAndParse only asserts a func child exists; does not validate block structure for edge cases (nested blocks, empty bodies, annotations)
New language config tests cover happy paths only; no test for malformed input (unclosed triple-quote, unterminated block comment, empty source)
New tripleQuote config field has no test proving it interacts correctly with charLiterals/strChars when all are enabled simultaneously
C# 11 raw strings with 4+ quotes desync state machine; documented limitation but no test proving graceful degradation
funcParenName reserved-word guard omits try/synchronized/using/lock/fixed; Java/C# control headers misclassify as named funcs
Four new .wasm files added to embed.FS but no test verifies they are actually embedded and loadable
No test for C# verbatim strings (@"...") which are documented as out-of-scope; regression could silently break
funcParenName modifier allowlist removed; keyword-less statement-prefixed calls like `return foo() {` now name func "foo"
